chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4013 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16445/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 6 3. For order on Misc. No.16456/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.16457/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 29.8.2025 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. Learned counsel for the petitioner’s main grievance is to set aside the inquiry being conducted against the petitioner. The inquiry has not yet been completed and as such this petition is premature and is accordingly dismissed alongwith listed applications. However, the inquiry officer is directed to conclude the inquiry in accordance with law within a period of three months of the date of this order after giving an opportunity of personal hearing to the petitioner. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chairman, PTCL, for compliance. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
